monday.description: Pan-seared pork spare ribs served with quick-cook brown basmati rice, steamed green beans, and a side of coconut yogurt.

tuesday.description: Grilled free-range beef sirloin paired with toasted sourdough loaf, sautéed organic chayote squash, and garnished with dried rosemary.

wednesday.description: Pan-seared fresh bay scallops served with stir-fried shirataki noodles, blanched soybean sprouts, and a drizzle of reduced-sodium gravy.

thursday.description: Grilled bratwurst served with whole grain hulled millet, steamed organic watercress, and a side of reduced-sodium korma sauce.

friday.description: Slow-cooked beef stew meat served with toasted corn tortillas, sautéed organic bamboo shoots, and garnished with kaffir lime leaves.

monday.description: Poached salted duck eggs served with toasted country loaf, steamed organic soybean sprouts, and a dollop of crema mexicana.

tuesday.description: Crispy lavash crackers topped with sliced roquefort cheese, sautéed dried lion's mane mushrooms, and a side of viili yogurt.

wednesday.description: Toasted corn tortillas topped with sliced cheddar cheese, steamed kombu, and a sprinkle of ground sea salt.

thursday.description: Stir-fried canned cannellini beans served with lo mein noodles, sautéed organic chayote squash, and a sprinkle of ground ras el hanout.

friday.description: Tossed strozzapreti pasta with almond butter sauce, sautéed organic shallots, and a drizzle of korma sauce.
